name: Espresso Swirl
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
2. Add the dry ingredients gradually to the wet ingredients (milk) while stirring continuously.
3. Mix until smooth, ensuring no lumps remain.
4. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan or bundt pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
